name: memory-recall
description: Multi-dimension recall + auto-save. Recall: memory, skills, tools, agent types with reminder/agentic/embedding backends. Auto-save: Stop hook analyzes each turn and persists valuable knowledge via Haiku CRUD.

recall_enabled.title: Recall Enabled
recall_enabled.description: Enable memory recall on UserPromptSubmit and SubagentStart.

recall_effort.title: Recall Effort
recall_effort.description: Effort level for recall agentic calls: 'low' (faster/cheaper) or '' (default).

recall_async.title: Recall Async
recall_async.description: Run recall hook asynchronously. Default false (sync) because recall must inject context before agent responds.

recall_agentic_mode.title: Recall Agentic Mode
recall_agentic_mode.description: 'parallel' (one Haiku call per dimension) or 'merged' (single call for all dimensions, faster).

recall_context_messages.title: Recall Context Messages
recall_context_messages.description: Number of recent conversation messages to include for search context.

recall_context_max_chars.title: Recall Context Max Chars
recall_context_max_chars.description: Maximum characters of conversation context to send.

recall_max_content_chars.title: Recall Max Content Chars
recall_max_content_chars.description: Maximum total characters of injected memory content.

recall_memory_input.title: Memory Input Granularity
recall_memory_input.description: What Haiku sees: 'title_desc' (name+description) or 'full' (entire file content).

recall_memory_output.title: Memory Output Granularity
recall_memory_output.description: What gets injected to main model: 'title_desc' or 'full' (entire file content).

recall_skills_input.title: Skills Input Granularity
recall_skills_input.description: What Haiku sees: 'title_desc' (name+description) or 'full' (SKILL.md content, truncated).

recall_skills_output.title: Skills Output Granularity
recall_skills_output.description: What gets injected: 'title_desc' (name+reason) or 'full' (skill SKILL.md content).

recall_tools_input.title: Tools Input Granularity
recall_tools_input.description: What Haiku sees: 'title_desc' (name+description) or 'full' (full tool description).

recall_agents_input.title: Agents Input Granularity
recall_agents_input.description: What Haiku sees: 'title_desc' (name+description) or 'full' (agent markdown content, truncated).

recall_agents_output.title: Agents Output Granularity
recall_agents_output.description: What gets injected: 'title_desc' (name+reason) or 'full' (agent markdown content).

recall_embedding_model.title: Recall Embedding Model
recall_embedding_model.description: HuggingFace model name for embedding backend.

recall_embedding_python.title: Recall Embedding Python Path
recall_embedding_python.description: Path to Python with sentence-transformers installed.

recall_embedding_threshold.title: Recall Embedding Threshold
recall_embedding_threshold.description: Cosine similarity threshold; below this falls back to reminder.

recall_embedding_top_k.title: Recall Embedding Top K
recall_embedding_top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return per dimension.

memory_save_enabled.title: Memory Save Enabled
memory_save_enabled.description: Enable automatic memory saving after each assistant turn (Stop hook).

memory_save_effort.title: Memory Save Effort
memory_save_effort.description: Effort level for memory save calls: '' (default) or 'low'.

memory_save_async.title: Memory Save Async
memory_save_async.description: Run memory save hook asynchronously. Default true -- save doesn't need to block.

memory_save_context_turns.title: Memory Save Context Turns
memory_save_context_turns.description: Number of recent conversation turns to provide for analysis.

pair_programmer_enabled.title: Pair Programmer Enabled
pair_programmer_enabled.description: Enable PostToolUse sidecar pair programmer that evaluates agent actions.

pair_programmer_effort.title: Pair Programmer Effort
pair_programmer_effort.description: Effort level for pair programmer calls: '' (default) or 'low'.

pair_programmer_async.title: Pair Programmer Async
pair_programmer_async.description: Run pair programmer hook asynchronously. Default true.

pair_programmer_sample_rate.title: Pair Programmer Sample Rate
pair_programmer_sample_rate.description: Probability of evaluating each action tool call (0.0-1.0). Lower = cheaper.

pair_programmer_cooldown_s.title: Pair Programmer Cooldown (seconds)
pair_programmer_cooldown_s.description: Minimum seconds between evaluations. Prevents rapid-fire during batch edits.

pair_programmer_context_messages.title: Pair Programmer Context Messages
pair_programmer_context_messages.description: Number of recent conversation messages to include in trajectory.

pair_programmer_context_max_chars.title: Pair Programmer Context Max Chars
pair_programmer_context_max_chars.description: Maximum characters of conversation context for pair programmer.

pair_programmer_max_tool_input_chars.title: Pair Programmer Max Tool Input Chars
pair_programmer_max_tool_input_chars.description: Maximum characters of tool input to include in trajectory.

pair_programmer_max_tool_output_chars.title: Pair Programmer Max Tool Output Chars
pair_programmer_max_tool_output_chars.description: Maximum characters of tool output to include in trajectory.

pair_programmer_max_recall_files.title: Pair Programmer Max Recall Files
pair_programmer_max_recall_files.description: Maximum number of memory files to recall for evaluation context.

pair_programmer_max_memory_file_chars.title: Pair Programmer Max Memory File Chars
pair_programmer_max_memory_file_chars.description: Maximum characters to read from each recalled memory file.

curator_enabled.title: Curator Enabled
curator_enabled.description: Enable periodic memory consolidation on Stop hook.
